---
title: "deseq_protein_only"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-18"
---

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(apeglm)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(biomaRt)
```

```{r}
# Load counts
counts_pc <- read.csv("/Volumes/Sabrina/tximport_results/all_samples_counts_matrix.csv",
                      row.names = 1)

# Clean column names
colnames(counts_pc) <- gsub("^X", "", colnames(counts_pc))
colnames(counts_pc) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(counts_pc))
colnames(counts_pc) <- gsub("2O", "20", colnames(counts_pc))

# Replace NA with 0
counts_pc[is.na(counts_pc)] <- 0

# Ensure integers
counts_pc <- round(counts_pc)

# Remove Ensembl version numbers (IMPORTANT)
rownames(counts_pc) <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(counts_pc))
```

```{r}
#get mouse protein-coding genes

mart <- useEnsembl(
  biomart = "genes",
  dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl"
)

annotation <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = rownames(counts_pc),
  mart = mart
)

protein_ids <- annotation %>%
  filter(gene_biotype == "protein_coding") %>%
  pull(ensembl_gene_id)

# Subset to protein-coding genes only
counts_pc <- counts_pc[rownames(counts_pc) %in% protein_ids, ]

dim(counts_pc)

```

```{r}
sample_names_pc <- colnames(counts_pc)

coldata_pc <- data.frame(
  row.names = sample_names_pc,
  age = ifelse(grepl("young", sample_names_pc), "young", "old")
)

coldata_pc$age <- factor(coldata_pc$age, levels = c("young", "old"))

all(colnames(counts_pc) == rownames(coldata_pc))

```

```{r}
dds_pc <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_pc,
  colData = coldata_pc,
  design = ~ age
)

dds_pc <- dds_pc[rowSums(counts(dds_pc)) >= 20 ]

dim(dds_pc)

dds_pc <- DESeq(dds_pc)

res_pc <- results(dds_pc, contrast = c("age", "old", "young"))
res_pc <- lfcShrink(dds_pc, coef = "age_old_vs_young", type = "apeglm")

```


```{r}
res_df_pc <- as.data.frame(res_pc)
res_df_pc <- res_df_pc[order(res_df_pc$padj), ]

sig_genes_pc <- subset(res_df_pc, padj < 0.05)
```


```{r}
write.csv(res_df_pc, "DESeq2_results_protein_only_mouse.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(sig_genes_pc, "DESeq2_sig_genes_protein_only_mouse.csv", row.names = TRUE)

cat("Files exported:\n")
cat("- DESeq2_results_protein_only_mouse.csv\n")
cat("- DESeq2_sig_genes_protein_only_mouse.csv\n")
cat("Current directory is:", getwd(), "\n")

```


```{r}
rld_pc <- rlog(dds_pc, blind = FALSE)
plotPCA(rld_pc, intgroup = "age")
print(plotPCA)

```

```{r}
library(biomaRt)

# Connect to mouse Ensembl
mart <- useEnsembl(
  biomart = "genes",
  dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl"
)

# Get gene symbols for your DEGs
gene_map <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = rownames(res_df_pc),
  mart = mart
)

# Merge with your DESeq2 results
res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id <- rownames(res_df_pc)
res_df_pc <- merge(res_df_pc, gene_map, by = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)


```



```{r}
colnames(res_df_pc)
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Ensure Ensembl IDs are character and strip version numbers
res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id <- as.character(res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id)
res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id <- sub("\\..*$", "", res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id)

# Step 2: Create a gene_label column (use mgi_symbol if available, else Ensembl ID)
res_df_pc <- res_df_pc %>%
  mutate(gene_label = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "",
                             mgi_symbol,
                             ensembl_gene_id))

# Step 3: Filter significant genes (padj < 0.05)
sig_genes_pc <- res_df_pc %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_label, ensembl_gene_id, log2FoldChange, padj)



# Step 4: Save or view results
head(sig_genes_pc)
write.csv(sig_genes_pc, "significant_genes_pc.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}

# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)  # for nice non-overlapping labels

# Step 1: Volcano plot
# Add a column to highlight significant genes
res_df_pc$significant <- ifelse(!is.na(res_df_pc$padj) & res_df_pc$padj < 0.05, "yes", "no")

# Select top genes to label (e.g., top 10 by padj)
top_genes <- sig_genes_pc %>%
  dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
  head(10)

# Volcano plot
volcano <- ggplot(res_df_pc, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = significant), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("no" = "grey", "yes" = "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot of PC Significant Genes",
       x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(adj. p-value)") +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes,
                  aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), label = gene_label),
                  size = 3, max.overlaps = Inf)

# Show the plot
print(volcano)

# Optional: save the plot
ggsave("volcano_plot_pc_annotated.png", volcano, width = 8, height = 6)

# Step 2: Save table of all significant genes
write.csv(sig_genes_pc, "significant_genes_pc.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Optional: view top rows
head(sig_genes_pc)


```
```{r}
# Ensure gene_label exists
res_df_pc$gene_label <- ifelse(!is.na(res_df_pc$mgi_symbol) & res_df_pc$mgi_symbol != "",
                               res_df_pc$mgi_symbol,
                               res_df_pc$ensembl_gene_id)

# Significant genes in old (upregulated in old)
sig_genes_old <- res_df_pc[!is.na(res_df_pc$padj) & res_df_pc$padj < 0.05 & res_df_pc$log2FoldChange > 0, ]
sig_genes_old <- sig_genes_old[, c("gene_label", "ensembl_gene_id", "log2FoldChange", "padj")]
sig_genes_old <- sig_genes_old[order(sig_genes_old$padj), ]

# Save CSV
write.csv(sig_genes_old, "significant_genes_old.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Significant genes in young (upregulated in young)
sig_genes_young <- res_df_pc[!is.na(res_df_pc$padj) & res_df_pc$padj < 0.05 & res_df_pc$log2FoldChange < 0, ]
sig_genes_young <- sig_genes_young[, c("gene_label", "ensembl_gene_id", "log2FoldChange", "padj")]
sig_genes_young <- sig_genes_young[order(sig_genes_young$padj), ]

# Save CSV
write.csv(sig_genes_young, "significant_genes_young.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r}
colnames(colData(dds_pc))

```


```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)

# --- Step 1: Variance-stabilizing transformation ---
vsd <- vst(dds_pc, blind = FALSE)

# --- Step 2: Expression matrix for significant genes ---
sig_gene_ids <- sig_genes_pc$ensembl_gene_id
expr_mat <- assay(vsd)[sig_gene_ids, ]

# Optional: replace rownames with gene symbols
rownames(expr_mat) <- sig_genes_pc$gene_label

# --- Step 3: Sample annotation ---
sample_annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds_pc)[, "age", drop = FALSE])
colnames(sample_annot) <- "Age"
rownames(sample_annot) <- colnames(expr_mat)  # match samples

# --- Step 4: Plot heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_mat,
         scale = "row",             # standardize each gene
         cluster_rows = TRUE,       # cluster genes
         cluster_cols = TRUE,       # cluster samples
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 8,
         main = "Heatmap of Significant Protein-Coding Genes")

# --- Step 5: Save heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_mat,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         filename = "heatmap_sig_genes.png",
         width = 10,
         height = 8)

```

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)

# --- Step 1: Select top 20 significant genes by padj ---
top20_genes <- sig_genes_pc %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(20)

# --- Step 2: Variance-stabilizing transformation ---
vsd <- vst(dds_pc, blind = FALSE)

# --- Step 3: Expression matrix for top 20 genes ---
expr_mat <- assay(vsd)[top20_genes$ensembl_gene_id, ]

# Optional: replace rownames with gene symbols
rownames(expr_mat) <- top20_genes$gene_label

# --- Step 4: Sample annotation ---
sample_annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds_pc)[, "age", drop = FALSE])
colnames(sample_annot) <- "Age"
rownames(sample_annot) <- colnames(expr_mat)

# --- Step 5: Plot heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_mat,
         scale = "row",             # standardize each gene
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         main = "Top 20 Significant Protein-Coding Genes")

# --- Step 6: Save heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_mat,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         filename = "heatmap_top20_sig_genes.png",
         width = 10,
         height = 8)

```

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)

# --- Step 1: Variance-stabilizing transformation ---
vsd <- vst(dds_pc, blind = FALSE)

# --- Step 2: Expression matrix for old ---
top15_old <- head(sig_genes_old[order(sig_genes_old$padj), ], 15)
expr_old <- assay(vsd)[top15_old$ensembl_gene_id, ]
rownames(expr_old) <- top15_old$gene_label

# --- Step 3: Expression matrix for young ---
top15_young <- head(sig_genes_young[order(sig_genes_young$padj), ], 15)
expr_young <- assay(vsd)[top15_young$ensembl_gene_id, ]
rownames(expr_young) <- top15_young$gene_label

# --- Step 4: Sample annotation ---
sample_annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds_pc)[, "age", drop = FALSE])
colnames(sample_annot) <- "Age"
rownames(sample_annot) <- colnames(vsd)

# --- Step 5: Heatmap for old ---
pheatmap(expr_old,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         main = "Top 15 Significant Genes Up in Old")

# Save heatmap
pheatmap(expr_old,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         filename = "heatmap_top20_old.png",
         width = 10,
         height = 8)

# --- Step 6: Heatmap for young ---
pheatmap(expr_young,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         main = "Top 15 Significant Genes Up in Young")

# Save heatmap
pheatmap(expr_young,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         filename = "heatmap_top15_young.png",
         width = 10,
         height = 8)

```

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)

# --- Step 1: Top 15 genes up in young ---
top15_young <- head(sig_genes_young[order(sig_genes_young$padj), ], 15)

# --- Step 2: Variance-stabilizing transformation ---
vsd <- vst(dds_pc, blind = FALSE)

# --- Step 3: Expression matrix for top 20 young genes ---
expr_young <- assay(vsd)[top15_young$ensembl_gene_id, ]
rownames(expr_young) <- top15_young$gene_label

# --- Step 4: Sample annotation ---
sample_annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds_pc)[, "age", drop = FALSE])
colnames(sample_annot) <- "Age"
rownames(sample_annot) <- colnames(vsd)

# --- Step 5: Plot heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_young,
         scale = "row",             # standardize genes
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         main = "Top 15 Significant Genes Up in Young")

# --- Step 6: Save heatmap ---
pheatmap(expr_young,
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = sample_annot,
         filename = "heatmap_top15_young.png",
         width = 10,
         height = 8)

```

```{r}



```
